chapter_title.en: Recognizing the Dawn and the Saying Upon Seeing it

text: 1437 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ وَقْتَ اَلْغَدَاةِ إِذَا اِعْتَرَضَ اَلْفَجْرُ فَأَضَاءَ حَسَناً.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1437 - It has been narrated:
"The time of Fajr (morning prayer) begins when the true dawn appears and spreads light horizontally in a good way”.
